meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - The Truth, Whole Truth and Nothing b/t Truth of Cybersec - Louis Deweaver
meta.description: An unfiltered look at the cybersecurity industry's overpromises, vendor hype, and the importance of practical action over shiny tools.
